**Email Draft for Marcus Chen to David Kumar:**

Subject: Home Office Setup - New Residence

Hi David,

I wanted to update you on my upcoming move and coordinate on the home office setup for my new residence.

As you know, I have permanent remote work approval (effective October 2024), and I'm moving to a new home in the Junction Triangle area with closing on December 12th and move-in on December 14th.

The new property has a dedicated room with a door that will serve as my home office, which meets our confidentiality requirements. I'm planning the setup to ensure full compliance with my Level 2 security clearance requirements, including:

• Wired ethernet connection for secure network access
• Separate business phone line 
• Proper lighting for video calls and meetings
• Secure, private workspace with door for confidential work

I have the approved CAD $8,000 business equipment budget available for the home office setup. Could we schedule a brief call to discuss any specific company requirements or IT considerations for the new office space? I want to ensure everything is properly configured before I'm fully operational in the new location.

I expect to be settled and fully operational by December 16th. Please let me know if you need any additional information or if there are specific protocols I should follow for the office transition.

Best regards,
Marcus
